summary: Completed backend API testing for Sub-fase 1.11 - Returns & Barang Sisa. 12 out of 13 backend tests passed. File upload fails due to missing EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configuration. Frontend testing incomplete - unable to access Returns page through UI navigation.

critical_bugs.issue: File upload returns 500 Internal Server Error - EMERGENT_LLM_KEY belum dikonfigurasi
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot upload attachment photos/documents to returns
critical_bugs.error_details: RuntimeError: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY belum dikonfigurasi in storage_service.py line 42
critical_bugs.root_cause: Storage service requires EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable but it's not set in backend/.env

working_endpoints: GET /api/sales-returns - list returns with filters (status, order_id, entity_id, return_type)
POST /api/sales-returns/{id}/approve - approve and adjust stock (admin/manager only)

integration_issues.issue: Unable to access Returns page through UI navigation - menu item not found in sidebar
integration_issues.details: Returns component exists in App.js (line 210) but navigation link is not accessible in the UI. Navigation config shows 'returns' is configured for roles: admin, sales, manager

passed_tests: Create and confirm sales order (prerequisite for returns)
Submit return for approval (status transition: draft → pending_approval)
Approve return with stock adjustment (creates inventory rolls and movements)
Create return with submit_now=true (direct to pending_approval)
List returns with status filters (approved, rejected)
Validate return creation from invalid order status (correctly returns 400)

action_item_for_main_agent.item: Fix Returns page navigation - menu item not accessible in UI. Verify navigationConfig.js integration with Sidebar component.
Configure EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env or fix storage_service.py to handle file uploads without requiring this key. File upload endpoint returns 500 error.

After fixing navigation and storage issues, perform end-to-end frontend testing to verify: (1) Returns list view with filters, (2) Create return form, (3) Return detail view, (4) Approve/Reject actions, (5) File upload functionality
